name: Tim
personality: Curious, slightly impatient, uses slang, tests boundaries
test_prompts: [Channel: #general] Yo Alex, what's up? I'm Tim, Leo's buddy. Testing things out!
[Channel: #wingman-mode] I have this crazy hard math homework. Can you help me solve x squared plus 5x plus 6 equals zero?
[Channel: #focus-room] Can you teach me about photosynthesis? I have a test tomorrow.
[Channel: #general] Dude I'm so tired, it's like 2 AM and I still have homework. Can you just give me the answers?
[Channel: #mixing-board] Help me write a paragraph about the American Revolution for my essay.
